ul.li: Branch predictor trains on loop pattern

div.p: CV < 2% → Measurements reliable Report: median + stddev
CV > 2% → Too much noise Fix: re-pin CPU, check for background processes
Symptom: First run 10-100x slower Cause: Cold cache, CPU at idle freq
Symptom: CV > 10%, results vary Cause: CPU frequency fluctuates 2.4 GHz → 4.5 GHz randomly
Symptom: Result skewed by one slow run (GC, interrupt) Fix: Use median (robust)
Symptom: "It takes 500ns" Reality: 500ns ± 300ns Always report stddev/CV!
Symptom: Negative times, variance Cause: clock_gettime overhead ~30ns Fix: measure loop of 1000+ calls
Symptom: Impossibly fast (0ns) Cause: Dead code elimination Fix: use volatile or sink variable
=== Array Addition (10000 floats) === median=1650 ns stddev=12.8 ns CV=0.8% ✓ CV < 2%: measurements reliable ✓ Frequency stable at 2400 MHz ✓ 0 outliers detected
=== Array Addition (10000 floats) === median=1200 ns stddev=487 ns CV=40.6% ✗ CV > 10%: NOISE, not signal ✗ Frequency varied 800-4500 MHz ✗ 3/15 runs were outliers ✗ Turbo boost was ENABLED
